response.overview: A Captain Unafraid (2017) is a documentary feature film which I directed and produced concerning sailor and adventurer "Dynamite" Johnny O' Brien. Involved in ruction and revolution on manys the foreign shore, in many ways Johnny was a rebel without a cause, that is, until he found his cause in the late 19th century Cuban War Of Independence. The seed for this documentary was planted with a song I wrote "Marine Mambí, Johnny Dynamite."
response.tagline: 'A Captain Unafraid' charts the life and times of 'Dynamite' Johnny O' Brien, 19th century sailor, adventurer and hot-headed rebel.
response.title: A Captain Unafraid
